# Neighborhood Guide

Local services and opening hours.

starterFiles.content:
# Neighborhood Guide

Local services and opening hours.

Old contact list

Retired phone tree.
Help desk hours: 10 AM - 4 PM

Neighborhood services

Welcome desk
Food pantry

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=neighborhood-guide
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" config --local user.name || true)" = 'ZoeSkoul Learner' ] || fail "The local author name is not correct."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" config --local user.email || true)" = learner@zoeskoul.local ] || fail "The local author email is not correct."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 1 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -z "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The working tree is not clean yet."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" 'README.md
old-contacts.txt
hours.txt
services.txt' | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=neighborhood-guide
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 2 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."

set -eu

git -C neighborhood-guide config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner'
git -C neighborhood-guide config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local
mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide
printf %s '# Neighborhood Guide

Local services and opening hours.
' > neighborhood-guide/README.md
mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide
printf %s 'Neighborhood services

Welcome desk
Food pantry

mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide
printf %s 'Help desk hours: 10 AM - 4 PM
' > neighborhood-guide/hours.txt
mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide
printf %s 'Old contact list

Retired phone tree.
' > neighborhood-guide/old-contacts.txt
git -C neighborhood-guide add -A
GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C neighborhood-guide commit -q -m 'Start neighborhood guide'

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=neighborhood-guide
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 3 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The expected unfinished change is missing."
expected_staged=$(printf "%s\n" .gitignore | sort)
actual_staged=$(git -C "$repo" diff --cached --name-only | sort)
[ "$actual_staged" = "$expected_staged" ] || fail "The staged file set is not correct."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- generated/preview.txt || fail 'generated/preview.txt should be ignored.'
[ -f "$repo/.gitignore" ] || fail '.gitignore is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/.gitignore")" = generated/ ] || fail '.gitignore does not contain the required text.'
[ -f "$repo/generated/preview.txt" ] || fail 'generated/preview.txt is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/generated/preview.txt")" = '' ] || fail 'generated/preview.txt does not contain the required text.'

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=neighborhood-guide
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 3 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The expected unfinished change is missing."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- generated/preview.txt || fail 'generated/preview.txt should be ignored.'
[ -f "$repo/README.md" ] || fail 'README.md is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/README.md")" = '# Neighborhood Guide

Local services and opening hours.' ] || fail 'README.md does not contain the required text.'
[ -f "$repo/community-services.txt" ] || fail 'community-services.txt is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/community-services.txt")" = 'Neighborhood services

Welcome desk
Food pantry' ] || fail 'community-services.txt does not contain the required text.'
[ -f "$repo/.gitignore" ] || fail '.gitignore is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/.gitignore")" = generated/ ] || fail '.gitignore does not contain the required text.'
[ ! -e "$repo/services.txt" ] || fail 'services.txt should not exist.'
[ ! -e "$repo/old-contacts.txt" ] || fail 'old-contacts.txt should not exist.'

learningGoals: Create and configure a repository from an ordinary project folder
Edit, inspect, stage, and commit two focused content changes
Create and verify an ignore policy for generated previews
Unstage and restore an accidental edit before structural cleanup
Rename and remove tracked paths, then audit the four-commit handoff
